fields.name: offer_scripts
fields.description: Collection of marketing offer scripts to be delivered by Customer Services, each representing a distinct product or service promotion

children.name: id
children.description: Unique identifier for the offer script

children.name: name
children.description: Human-readable title of the offer or promotion

children.name: department_from
children.description: Originating department that created the offer script

children.name: department_to
children.description: Receiving department responsible for delivering the offer to customers

children.name: created_date
children.description: Date when the offer script was created

children.name: effective_date
children.description: Date when the offer script becomes active and eligible for delivery

children.name: status
children.description: Current lifecycle status of the offer script

children.name: target_segment
children.description: Customer segment or cohort for which this offer is intended

children.name: script_type
children.description: Channel or medium through which the offer script will be delivered

children.name: duration_seconds
children.description: Estimated duration in seconds for verbal delivery; null for non-voice channels such as email

children.name: content
children.description: Full text of the offer script to be delivered to the customer

children.name: call_to_action
children.description: Specific prompt or instruction directing the customer toward the desired response or next step

children.name: success_metric
children.description: Key performance indicator or business outcome that defines successful delivery of this offer

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Administrative metadata about the offer scripts collection

children.name: total_scripts
children.description: Count of offer scripts contained in this payload

children.name: last_updated
children.description: Date when the offer scripts collection was last modified

children.name: version
children.description: Version identifier for the offer scripts schema or dataset
